relay.title: BLE relay
relay.description: Select the ESPHome node that scans for Sonoff BLE remotes.

setup.title: Add remote
setup.description: Configure the Sonoff remote you want to add.

pair.title: Pairing
pair.description:
Click Submit, then press any button on the {model} within {timeout} seconds.

Listening on ESPHome relay: {relay}

manual.title: Manual device ID
manual.description: Enter the hex device ID from ESPHome logs (e.g. 5acc35c8, no 0x prefix).

error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be 6-8 hex characters.
error.already_configured: This remote is already added on this BLE relay.
error.pair_timeout: No button press detected. Check the ESPHome relay is online and in range.
error.invalid_name: Please enter a name for this remote.
error.invalid_relay: Selected device is not a valid ESPHome node.
